Bus Timings

Bus 161 Timings Commercial International Bank to Khalifa City, Souq

February 17, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s efficient public transportation system is designed to connect all corners of the city, and Reg Bus 161 is a great example of that. This route conveniently links Al Bateen with Khalifa City, passing through key residential, commercial, and healthcare hubs. Whether you’re commuting to work, visiting a hospital, or exploring the city, Bus 161 offers a reliable and affordable way to navigate Abu Dhabi.

Operational Details

Reg Bus 161 operates throughout the day with frequent services, ensuring passengers can easily plan their travel, whether they’re commuting to work or heading out for leisure. Below are the bus timings for both directions:

From Commercial International Bank From Khalifa City, Souq
06:51 05:50
07:11 06:10
07:31 06:30
07:51 06:50
08:11 07:10
08:31 07:30
08:51 07:50
09:11 08:10
09:31 08:30
09:51 08:50
10:16 09:15
10:46 09:45
11:16 10:15
11:46 10:45
12:16 11:15
12:46 11:45
13:16 12:15
13:46 12:45
14:16 13:15
14:46 13:45
15:16 14:15
15:46 14:45
16:16 15:15
16:46 15:45
17:11 16:10
17:31 16:30
17:51 16:50
18:11 17:10
18:31 17:30
18:51 17:50
19:11 18:10
19:31 18:30
19:51 18:50
20:16 19:15

00:16 23:15

Download PDF Bus 161

Bus 161 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link to access the 161 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: The ticketing system for Reg Bus 161 is straightforward and budget-friendly, making it an affordable option for commuters:

  • Cash Ticket: AED 2.00, with an additional AED 0.05 per kilometer.

  • Payment Methods: Passengers can use the Hafilat Smart Card, which can be topped up online or at various kiosks around the city. This card ensures a quick and cashless way to pay for your journey, offering added convenience to frequent travelers.

Route Overview

Here’s a breakdown of the key stops along Bus 161:

  1. Abu Dhabi Commercial International Bank A bustling financial center in Al Bateen.

  2. Abu Dhabi Childrens Garden A family-friendly stop with green spaces for relaxation.

  3. Al Bateen Street A residential street, offering convenient access to homes and shops.

  4. Dana Plaza A popular shopping and dining destination.

  5. Mubarak Bin Mohammed Street A significant road connecting various residential and commercial areas.

  6. Jaber Al Hindi Mosque A peaceful stop near one of Abu Dhabi’s well-known mosques.

7.

  1. Etisalat Near the telecommunications hub.

  2. Al Falah Street A busy street with access to commercial zones.

  3. Hazaa Bin Zayed Street A central road linking several parts of the city.

  4. Mohammed Bin Khalifa Street A key route through the city’s heart.

  5. Immigration Department A major government office stop.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

13.

  1. Rabdan Street Another vital street along the bus route.

  2. Saif Ghobash Street Connecting travelers to hospitals and other important institutions.

  3. Al Noor Hospital A stop serving those heading to one of Abu Dhabi’s leading healthcare providers.

  4. Al Maqta Bus Interchange A critical point for transfers to other bus routes.

  5. NMC Royal Hospital A healthcare destination for those in need of medical services.

  6. Khalifa City Souq The final stop in the vibrant Khalifa City, home to a large market area.

Accessibility Features

Reg Bus 161 is designed to be accessible to all passengers, ensuring that everyone can travel comfortably. The buses are equipped with ramps, designated seating areas for differently-abled passengers, and audio-visual aids to assist those with hearing or vision impairments. This inclusive approach makes sure that all passengers, regardless of their mobility needs, can travel safely and comfortably.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

Whether you’re heading to Khalifa City, Al Bateen, or beyond, these transfer points make navigating the city much easier, allowing you to seamlessly plan multi-destination trips without any hassle.

Nearby Attractions

  • Abu Dhabi Commercial International Bank

  • Dana Plaza
  • Mishrif Mall
  • NMC Royal Hospital & Al Noor Hospital
  • Al Bateen Children’s Garden

Journey Experience

A trip on Bus 161 from Commercial International Bank to Khalifa City, Souq offers a long yet engaging journey through Abu Dhabi’s vibrant districts.

Travel Tips

  1. Plan ahead: Check the bus schedule in advance to avoid waiting times.

  2. Use the transport app: The Abu Dhabi Department of Transport app provides real-time updates on schedules and any potential delays.

  3. Travel during off-peak hours: Avoid the morning and evening rush if possible for a more relaxed trip.

  4. Carry your Hafilat Card: It’s a quicker and more convenient way to pay.

Reg Bus 161 provides a reliable, efficient, and budget-friendly way to travel between Al Bateen and Khalifa City, covering key locations in the city.

Whether you’re heading to work, shopping, or simply exploring the city, Reg Bus 161 offers a smooth and comfortable travel experience. Hop on board and explore the best of Abu Dhabi with this essential bus route! For more details on other routes and travel options, be sure to check out the Full Abu Dhabi Bus Routes to make your journey even more convenient.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: February 17, 2026.
